phases.title: Mock Kill + Real Backend Wire-Up
phases.goal: Zero fake-data in execution paths. 100% real backend before Day 14.
acceptance_criteria: grep -rE 'random\.(randint|choice)' api/ linkedin/ daemon/ returns zero in production paths
stub_execute_skill deleted, _exec_cobaia_warmup calls real LI MCP
Comment edit/delete endpoints either complete or hidden from UI
LI_USE_MOCK flag removed from dashboard/app.js entirely
All n/c channels either inline-configurable or removed
Daemon TODOs 548 (Telegram STOP), 906 (inbox), 911 (sequence due), 948 (channel send) closed
intelligence/scoring.py implemented OR /api/daemon/recalc-scoring returns 501
MockDispatcher production guard logs loudly if activated
CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD configurable via pref/env
MAX_REACT_ITERATIONS configurable per intent type

phases.title: IA Consolidation + Cmd+K Command Palette
phases.goal: Reduce sidebar 17 to 8 items. Add Cmd+K palette via kbar. Breadcrumb trail.
acceptance_criteria: Primary sidebar: Control, Cobaia, Pipeline, Outreach (merged Prospects+Propostas+Auditoria), Skills, Observability, AI Terminal, Settings
Collapsible Advanced section: Lab, MCP Gateway, Skill Proposals, Memory, Missions
Cmd+K opens kbar with fuzzy search of all pages + entities + actions
Breadcrumb trail: Dashboard > Outreach > [Business Name] > Audit
Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+N/G/R/A/Shift+S + Tab/Shift+Tab navigation
Filter state persisted in sessionStorage/URL params + Smart View save
Modal-heavy create flows replaced with dedicated pages or step wizards

phases.title: Onboarding Wizard 5min
phases.goal: Caio Day 0 to working cobaia in less than 5min without docs.
acceptance_criteria: 5-step wizard: 1) Cookies LI, 2) Email warmup setup, 3) ICP filters (Cuiaba), 4) First sequence template, 5) Launch confirm
cobaia_preflight all-green required to enable Launch
Replaces scattered Configuracoes modal flow

phases.title: Visual Redesign (tokens + typography + motion)
phases.goal: Tremor-aligned cockpit feel. Pro typography. Motion budget enforced.
acceptance_criteria: OKLCH color system with semantic tokens (success/warning/danger/info)
Light/dark/auto runtime toggle persisted in localStorage
Geist Sans + Geist Mono loaded with preload, Inter Tight fallback
All animations within 200/250/300/350ms budget, ESLint no-motion-over-500ms rule
WCAG AA contrast 4.5:1 minimum across all text (text-3 fix)
Lucide icons replacing inline emoji + scattered svg
Universal WS-based real-time updates with syncing badge + 'refreshed Xs ago' timestamps

phases.title: AI Command Bar + Streaming Brain Sidebar
phases.goal: Cmd+K accepts natural language to Brain.decide. Streaming ReAct trace sidebar.
acceptance_criteria: Cmd+K natural language: 'pause LinkedIn 1h' triggers Brain plans + confirm card
Brain sidebar streams ReAct trace token-by-token for any prospect/deal row
Citation pills on enriched fields (Hunter/Apollo/Firecrawl/LinkedIn) with freshness timestamp
Skill proposals persistence (F.4 table) complete with owner review workflow
Brain replay endpoint implemented or marked 501 explicitly

phases.title: Multi-Channel Campaign Editor (Lemlist-style)
phases.goal: Single drag-drop canvas mixing LI DM + email + WhatsApp + manual task with conditional branching.
acceptance_criteria: Visual flow canvas with channel icons + delay nodes + conditional branching diamonds
AI personalization variables with side-by-side per-prospect preview before activation
Template gallery (Cuiaba tech recruiters, retail audit, follow-up sequences)
Unified inbox merging replies across LI + email + WhatsApp per prospect
sequence_enrollments table + due-action query + execution pipeline implemented
Per-channel sending wired (SMTP + LinkedIn MCP + WhatsApp MCP)
Brain-powered auto-reply generation behind safety gates
Enrichment waterfall via MCP gateway (apollo/hunter/firecrawl)

phases.title: Performance + Accessibility Polish
phases.goal: WCAG 2.1 AA pass. axe-core green. FCP under 1.5s. TTI under 3s.
acceptance_criteria: axe-core CI passing zero violations
All interactive divs converted to buttons or role/tabindex/aria-label + onkeydown(Enter/Space) handlers
H1 per page via navigate() with aria-labelledby on main
Form labels associated via for/id pairs
Live regions (aria-live) for real-time updates (decisions, activity feed, KPI changes)
Focus-visible 3:1 contrast outline on all interactive elements
Deprecated events_jsonl_path column removed
skills_webhook.py archived (moved to VM)
intelligence/, task_queue/, channels/ stub modules implemented or removed
_health_ep.py registered or moved to api/
rate-limit @limiter.limit on all POST endpoints in server_ctrl.py

phases.title: Cobaia Operator Mode
phases.goal: 1-screen cockpit for Caio during live ops with pause/resume + deliverability + Brain queue + today actions.
acceptance_criteria: Single screen showing: cobaia health (green/amber/red) + warmup day + Brain queue count + today outreach count + LI rate-limit gauge + email reputation + emergency pause
Optional voice-to-action via Whisper ('pause cobaia', 'what is today hit rate')
Mobile-friendly responsive layout (Caio checks from phone)
Deliverability health score 0-100 with placement-per-provider tiles (Gmail/Outlook/Yahoo inbox vs spam)

blocking_criteria: UX-RM-F1 100% complete - zero mocks in execution paths
Brain confirmation drawer required for ALL destructive intents (send_outreach, accept_connect, send_email, send_whatsapp)
LI_USE_MOCK = false removed entirely (not just disabled)
Comment edit/delete: backend complete OR UI hidden
All n/c channels either inline-configurable or hidden
cobaia_preflight green-light required to start warmup
Manual smoke: schedule fake LI campaign -> confirm flow -> real execution OR confirmed no-op
Sentry breadcrumbs flowing for all cobaia events

memory_save.content: Hermes UX-AUDIT 2026-06-18 sealed. 8 phases UX-RM-F1..F8 (248h total). F1+F2 cobaia-blocking (72h). Stack 2026: shadcn+Tailwind v4 OKLCH+Motion 12+Geist+Lucide+Tremor+kbar Cmd+K. Critical mocks: api/pipelines.py:354 + linkedin/cobaia_warmup.py:357. PLAN+issues.json+roadmap.json at .claude/UX-AUDIT/

chapter_marker.title: UX-AUDIT Sealed
chapter_marker.summary: 8 phases roadmap UX-RM-F1..F8 sealed 2026-06-18, F1+F2 cobaia-blocking, mocks identified, stack 2026 chosen

persistence_protocol.reaudit_cadence: After every 2 phases (F2, F4, F6, F8). Snapshots at .claude/UX-AUDIT/_snapshots/2026-XX-XX.json
